name: Club Twirl Golf Lounge
about: Club Twirl Golf Lounge is an indoor golf simulator venue offering state-of-the-art technology with access to over 1500 courses worldwide. The facility provides a range of options including hourly tee times, practice sessions, leagues, lessons, and private events. Pricing is based on hourly bay rentals with tiered rates for 1, 2, and 3-hour sessions. The venue caters to both serious golfers looking to improve their game and casual players seeking a relaxed social environment. Its BYOB policy and modern atmosphere make it suitable for groups, parties, and individual practice.
why_golfers_like_it: Over 1500 global courses available with daily software updates
High-quality simulators with accurate ball and club tracking data
No waiting times - play at your own pace
Affordable pricing for various session lengths
Professional coaching options available for all skill levels
BYOB policy enhances the social experience

food_and_drink.notes: No food service mentioned, BYOB policy suggests external food allowed
BYOB (Bring Your Own Beverage) policy with no on-premise alcohol service

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The venue doesn't specify whether they provide club rentals, so it's recommended to bring your own clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, Club Twirl has a BYOB policy, allowing you to bring your own beverages. External food is also likely permitted given the venue's social nature.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: With no waiting times, players can complete 18 holes at their own pace, though specific timing isn't mentioned. The hourly sessions suggest flexibility in playing duration.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: There's no specific information about child-friendly amenities or age restrictions mentioned on the website.
